title: Once the press was muzzled, judiciary lost its way: Senior Advocate Sudeep Pasbola
description: Senior Advocate Sudeep Pasbola is among Mumbai’s leading criminal defence lawyers. He has practised for over 35 years in the Bombay High Court and subordinate courts. He also serves as Chairperson of the Bar Council of Maharashtra and Goa.An alumnus of Thane Law College, Pasbola has built his career on high-profile cases involving organised crime, terrorism, political defamation and civil liberties. He has appeared in some of Maharashtra’s most closely watched trials. His clients have included I
